jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Specsmakers
jsonLd.description:
Join the Specsmakers family as a SEO Specialist in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Specsmakers:
Specsmakers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
